hawkish_phrases: Monetary policy will need to remain restrictive for sufficiently long
services consumer price inflation...remains elevated, at 6.0%
the risk of inflation becoming embedded above the 2% target dissipates
Key indicators of inflation persistence...remain elevated
keep under review for how long Bank Rate should be maintained at its current level
dovish_phrases: CPI inflation is expected to return to close to the 2% target in the near term
CPI inflation was projected to be 1.9% in two years' time and 1.6% in three years
The restrictive stance of monetary policy is weighing on activity in the real economy
A margin of economic slack is projected to emerge during 2024 and 2025
the labour market continues to loosen
summary: The MPC voted 7-2 to maintain Bank Rate at 5.25%, with two members preferring a 0.25pp cut, emphasizing that monetary policy must remain restrictive for sufficiently long despite inflation falling and projections showing inflation below target in the medium term.
